assertions.text: Response runs 'clasp push --force' before deploying (push before deploy)
assertions.evidence: Response uses 'clasp push' (without --force) before 'clasp deploy'. The --force flag is absent. Additionally, the Option B section shows 'clasp push' then 'clasp deploy --deploymentId', but --force is never used.

assertions.text: Response includes 'clasp deploy --description' with a date-stamped description (e.g. yyyy-MM-dd format or $(Get-Date ...) expression)
assertions.evidence: Response uses 'clasp deploy --deploymentId <DEPLOYMENT_ID> --description "Run 3 complete"' — a static string, not a date-stamped description. No date format or Get-Date expression is used.

assertions.text: Response clarifies that the web app URL stays stable and only the version number changes
assertions.evidence: The stable deployment URL does not change — it now points to the new version automatically. (Also: 'The stable web app URL does not change' in the UI option)
